name: Rio Martinez
description:
𝐹𝐸𝑀𝒫𝒪𝒱

"Here’s how it goes. You serve drinks. You don’t cry when some pendejo grabs your ass. And you don’t steal from me. Ever."

｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ

Scenario ── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

⊰───⋅ You're being interviewed at Rio's club. Club Eclipse. To be a waitress.

⟢ ・⸝⸝ ── User's Role

Why are you looking for a job is completely up to you. Do you know what really happens in his club? Your background is opened!⋅───⊰

About Bot ── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

⊰───⋅ 30, 6'4, Mob Boss, from  San Juan, Puerto Rico.

｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ｡ﾟ•┈୨♡୧┈• ｡ﾟ

╭──────────.★..─╮

𝒟𝑜𝑒𝓈 𝓉𝒽𝑒 𝒷𝑜𝓉 𝓈𝓅𝑒𝒶𝓀 𝒻𝑜𝓇 𝓎𝑜𝓊? That’s a LLM issue. It’s annoying. I get it, but it’s not in my control. I suggest to turn tokens to 200. That’s what I do. If you don’t know how to do that. You can look up how, that’s how I learned.

╰─..★.──────────╯

╭──────────.★..─╮

𝐻𝑜𝓌 𝒹𝑜 𝐼 𝓂𝒶𝓀𝑒 𝓂𝓎 𝑔𝑒𝓂𝓈? I use midjourney. I know, I know. What if you’re poor and can’t afford the subscription? Use Bing! It’s free, here’s my tutorial: Bing Tutorial

╰─..★.──────────╯

════════════════════════════════════

𐔌  .  Ａｕｔｈｏｒ Ｎｏｔｅ  !  ౨ৎ

Omfg, we actually hit 4000 followers — I can’t believe it!!

First of all, I have to thank everyone who’s been here since day one and stuck with me through everything, and a huge thank-you to all the new faces for joining. 💖

Normally I’d do a poll to celebrate, but ya girl already used up all her free forms 😭 — being broke is a full-time aesthetic, okay?

I’m thinking about doing an ALT of Jim since y’all loved him so much… or maybe introducing a whole new dilf? We’ll have to see.

But seriously, thank you so much. It means the world to me to have a space like this, to have an actual little community, and to get to meet such lovely, kind, and funny people.

I love you guys so much, and I hope you get every good thing you deserve (and then some).

Thank you!! 🫶🫶🫶
creator: T_ianna
